by kyrylo
◉ frozen archive

level 1 · 8,0

Iridescent Mezzanine

A monitor scrolls endless error codes.
Fogged views twist landscapes.

Compass

N S E W
Go North Go South Go East Go West Go Up Go Down

Left click to draw ✏️, right click to erase 🧽
Your marks stay in this tab only and vanish when you leave.

Writings on the Wall

This wall is sealed. Nothing new can be saved.

  • Go west go east
  • Sono Chido Sadame , Joooooooooooooooooooooooooojo
  • P13 FROM NORTH
  • test
  • West is definitely dead end, tried myself
  • East is a dead end, if one can believe the scribbles at the next crossing. Trying west…
  • First choice. Came from south.
  • Where did I come from?
  • paste this code in and right click the screen to take effect document.querySelector("#canvas").getContext("2d").fillRect(0,0,10000,1000)
  • The wiping became abrasive after sometime, a poignant vignette in the full stop of his drab life
  • Nope. Try West.
  • Errors fall West and South. East is good.
  • I don't care what y'all say I'm trying east
  • West leads to dead end
  • coming back from east, nothing was there :(
  • im going east and NO ONE can stop me
  • The messages that East is a dead end are not lies
  • I give up I so lost, good luck to everyone else
  • south is the way
  • sO iS wEsT
  • meant west
  • Trusting previous message... Going south
  • east is a dead end
  • finally a fork in the road
  • Аварийный выход

The HTML Maze was built in July 2025 and frozen on 20 July 2026.
